title: Landing page loads primary marketing sections
description: Verifies the landing page renders core marketing content for first-time visitors.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the hero section is displayed
Verify the pricing section is displayed

title: Toggle interactive demo panel across all modes
description: Verifies the demo panel can be toggled between the three demo modes and updates the displayed demo content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle the demo panel to the Lagi rame mode
Toggle the demo panel to the Vetting creator mode
Toggle the demo panel to the Baca komentar mode
Verify the demo panel content updates to reflect the selected mode

title: Switch use-case tabs across all options
description: Verifies the use-case tabs switch content for UMKM, Agency, and Creator Scout.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Switch the use-case tab to UMKM
Switch the use-case tab to Agency
Switch the use-case tab to Creator Scout
Verify the use-case content updates to match the selected tab

title: Primary CTA navigates to signup
description: Verifies the main Mulai Gratis call-to-action takes the user to the registration page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Mulai Gratis call-to-action
Verify the user lands on the signup page

title: Smooth-scroll to pricing via Lihat Harga CTA and view pricing grid
description: Verifies that the Lihat Harga action moves the user to the pricing section where the pricing grid is visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Lihat Harga call-to-action
Verify the pricing grid is displayed

title: Pricing plan CTA starts signup flow
description: Verifies that selecting a pricing plan from the pricing section initiates an onboarding action leading to signup.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the pricing section
Click a pricing plan call-to-action button
Verify the user lands on the signup page or an external checkout is opened

title: Top navigation link to sign-in works
description: Verifies that the landing page navigation provides a route to the sign-in page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to sign in
Verify the user lands on the sign-in page

title: Mobile hamburger menu opens navigation options
description: Verifies the mobile menu can be opened to access navigation items on small screens.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Resize the viewport to a small mobile width
Open the mobile hamburger menu
Verify the mobile navigation menu is displayed

title: Successful signup redirects to getting started
description: Verifies a new user can register and is redirected to the /start onboarding page.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the full name field with Test User Signup
Fill in the company/brand name field with Test Brand
Fill in the email field with testuser+signup1@example.com
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Select a use case
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the getting started page

title: Signup shows validation error for malformed email
description: Verifies invalid email input is rejected with an inline error message.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the email field with invalid-email-format
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify an inline email validation error is visible

title: Signup requires password to be provided
description: Verifies submitting the signup form without a password shows an inline error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the email field with testuser+signup2@example.com
Submit the registration form
Verify a password validation error is visible

title: Signup requires email to be provided
description: Verifies submitting the signup form without an email shows an inline error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Use case selection is enforced when present
description: Verifies the form prevents submission when use-case selection is required and not chosen.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the full name field with Test User No Use Case
Fill in the email field with testuser+signup3@example.com
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify a use-case selection validation error is visible

title: Navigate from signup to sign-in via page link
description: Verifies users can switch from registration to the login page via an in-page navigation link.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Click the link to sign in instead
Verify the user lands on the sign-in page

title: Successful sign-in redirects to app workspace
description: Verifies an existing user can log in and is redirected to the /app dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /signin
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the main app dashboard

title: Invalid password shows authentication error
description: Verifies incorrect credentials display an inline error without redirecting into the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /signin
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible

title: Malformed email prevents sign-in submission
description: Verifies client-side validation rejects malformed email input.

steps.description: Navigate to /signin
Fill in the email field with invalid-email-format
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Sign-in requires password
description: Verifies the sign-in form cannot be submitted without a password.

steps.description: Navigate to /signin
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Submit the login form
Verify a password validation error is visible

title: Navigate from sign-in to signup via page link
description: Verifies users can reach the registration page from the login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /signin
Click the link to create an account
Verify the user lands on the signup page

title: Sign out from the app redirects to public landing page
description: Verifies an authenticated user can sign out from /app and is redirected to the public site.

steps.description: Navigate to /signin
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /app
Initiate the sign out action
Verify the user lands on the public landing page

title: Sign out from app prevents access to account page
description: Verifies that after signing out, the user no longer has an active session when navigating to an authenticated page.

steps.description: Navigate to /signin
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /app
Initiate the sign out action
Navigate to /account
Verify the user is prompted to sign in

title: Sign out action is accessible from the app shell
description: Verifies the app UI exposes a sign out control when the user is authenticated.

steps.description: Navigate to /signin
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /app
Verify a sign out action is available in the app navigation

title: Signing out twice does not break navigation to public pages
description: Verifies repeated sign out attempts do not trap the user or prevent access to the public site.

steps.description: Navigate to /signin
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Navigate to /app
Initiate the sign out action
Navigate to /app
Initiate the sign out action
Verify the user lands on the public landing page

title: Attempting to sign out from an already signed-out state keeps user on public site
description: Verifies that when no session is present, using sign out entrypoints does not cause errors and results in a public state.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Initiate the sign out action
Verify the user lands on the public landing page

title: Extract comments from a valid TikTok video URL
description: Verifies a user can extract and view comment cards from a TikTok video URL in the Komentar tab.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Click the Komentar tab
Fill a valid TikTok video URL into the video URL field
Click the action to extract comments
Wait for the extraction results to load
Verify extracted comment cards are displayed with usernames and comment text

title: Show validation/error state for invalid or unsupported video URL
description: Verifies the comments extractor shows an error when given an invalid or unsupported URL.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Click the Komentar tab
Fill an invalid or unsupported video URL into the video URL field
Click the action to extract comments
Verify an error message is visible indicating the URL is invalid or comments could not be fetched

title: Set max comments before extraction
description: Verifies setting a max comments limit affects the extraction request and results appear.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Click the Komentar tab
Fill a valid TikTok video URL into the video URL field
Fill a small valid number into the max comments field
Click the action to extract comments
Wait for the extraction results to load
Verify extracted comment cards are displayed

title: Show required-field validation when video URL is empty
description: Verifies the extractor prevents submission and shows a validation error when the URL field is empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Click the Komentar tab
Clear the video URL field
Click the action to extract comments
Verify a video URL validation error is visible

title: Prevent invalid max comments input
description: Verifies invalid max comments input shows a validation error and does not proceed.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Click the Komentar tab
Fill a valid TikTok video URL into the video URL field
Fill a non-numeric value into the max comments field
Click the action to extract comments
Verify a max comments validation error is visible

title: Comments extraction tab loads its primary UI
description: Verifies the Komentar tab renders the primary controls needed for extraction.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Click the Komentar tab
Verify the comments extraction input controls are displayed

title: Authenticated user can view account details and navigate to manage plan
description: Verifies an authenticated user can access /account, see plan/quota info, and navigate to /payment via manage plan.

steps.description: Navigate to /signin
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /account
Click the manage plan action
Verify the user lands on the payment page

title: Account page shows quota ring and plan features for authenticated user
description: Verifies the account page displays daily quota usage and current plan information after signing in.

steps.description: Navigate to /signin
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /account
Verify the quota usage ring and current plan details are displayed

title: Unauthenticated access to /account prompts authentication
description: Verifies navigating to the account page while unauthenticated redirects to sign-in or shows an authentication prompt.

steps.description: Navigate to /account
Verify the user is redirected to a sign-in view or prompted to authenticate

title: Account page quick link navigates back to the app
description: Verifies the account page provides a working quick link to return to the main app dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /signin
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /account
Click the quick link to return to the app
Verify the user lands on the app dashboard

title: Payment page loads plan cards and details
description: Verifies the pricing page displays available plan options and their details.

steps.description: Navigate to /payment
Verify multiple plan options are displayed with pricing and plan details

title: Selecting a plan initiates upgrade flow (redirect away from site)
description: Verifies clicking an upgrade action on a plan navigates away to the checkout flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /payment
Click the upgrade action on a paid plan
Verify the browser navigates away from the app to an external checkout

title: Navigate through main sidebar destinations and load content
description: Verifies the sidebar can navigate to Beranda, Riset, and Akun and the target page content loads.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Use the sidebar to go to the Beranda view
Use the sidebar to go to the Riset view
Click the Akun link in the sidebar
Verify the account page content is displayed

title: Sign out from sidebar and return to landing page
description: Verifies signing out from the sidebar redirects to the landing page and ends the session in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Use the sidebar to initiate sign out
Verify the user lands on the landing page

title: Sidebar billing link opens pricing/plan selection
description: Verifies the sidebar Billing navigation takes the user to the pricing and plan selection page.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Click the Billing link in the sidebar
Verify pricing and plan selection content is displayed

title: Upgrade to Pro from sidebar navigates to payment page
description: Verifies the Upgrade to Pro action in the sidebar takes the user to the payment page.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Click the Upgrade to Pro button in the sidebar
Verify pricing and plan selection content is displayed

title: Account page can be reached directly from app via sidebar
description: Verifies the account page is reachable via the sidebar and shows plan/quota information.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Click the Akun link in the sidebar
Verify plan and quota information is displayed on the account page

title: Sidebar remains usable after navigating to payment and returning to app
description: Verifies a cross-page journey using the sidebar still allows returning to the app workspace.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Click the Billing link in the sidebar
Navigate to /app
Use the sidebar to go to the Riset view
Verify the Riset view primary content is displayed

title: Sign out removes access to authenticated-only account page in current session
description: Verifies after signing out, attempting to access the account page does not show account content.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Use the sidebar to initiate sign out
Navigate to /account
Verify account page content is not displayed
